medications.name: varenicline
medications.frequency: once daily days 1-3, twice daily days 4-7, then 1 mg twice daily

plan: set quit date in next 2 weeks
start varenicline 1 week before quit date with the titration schedule for 12 weeks total
take varenicline with food and full glass of water
plan substitutes for smoking triggers: gum, walking, deep breaths
